title: Goa Nightclub Fire: Luthra Brothers To Walk Out Of Jail As Court Grants Bail In NOC Forgery Case
description: The Judicial Magistrate First Class (JMFC) court in Mapusa allowed brothers Gaurav Luthra and Saurabh Luthra to be released on bail on a bond of Rs 50,000 each and subject to conditions, observing that the investigation can continue even while the accused remain out of custody.
